content.json:
# Network Availability — Heartbeat & Agent Up/Down
**Theme:** Network availability · **Data source:** `Heartbeat` (Azure Monitor Agent).

Baselines which machines are reporting and surfaces missing/stale agents. Empty tiles usually mean AMA isn't onboarded for those hosts.

> Stale threshold (15 min) is a tunable starting point — adjust to your heartbeat interval.

content.query: Heartbeat | summarize LastSeen=max(TimeGenerated) by Computer, OSType | extend MinutesSince=datetime_diff('minute', now(), LastSeen) | extend Status=iff(MinutesSince > 15, 'STALE', 'OK') | sort by MinutesSince desc
content.title: Last heartbeat per host (stale > 15m)

content.query: Heartbeat | summarize Beats=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), OSType | render timechart
content.title: Heartbeat volume over time by OS

content.query: Heartbeat | summarize LastSeen=max(TimeGenerated) by Computer | where LastSeen < ago(1h) | extend MinutesSince=datetime_diff('minute', now(), LastSeen) | sort by MinutesSince desc
content.title: Agents that stopped reporting (> 1h)

content.query: Heartbeat | summarize Beats=count(), LastSeen=max(TimeGenerated) by Computer, Version, Category | top 200 by Beats desc
content.title: Heartbeat by agent version & category
